claim: The glossary sync test shall fail when a section-anchor token used in the framework is absent from the glossary.
why: Atom of R-glossary-sync-test (undefined-term concern). An undefined section-anchor is an unresolved reference that breaks speak-by-reference. ENFORCED 2026-07-13: TestAuditGlossarySync_FlagsUndefinedRefs in internal/generator/open_unenforced_glossary_test.go mechanically verifies this claim.
